title: Validate partner T-Echo LICHEN Native node_info RF observation
description: Partner reported that a LilyGO T-Echo is alive and sent a LICHEN Native node_info frame while monitoring for LoRa packets. Treat this as an initial RF observation, not confirmed bidirectional RX/TX. Acceptance: capture the exact firmware commit, board/overlay, radio settings, monitor command/log, decoded node_info payload, peer device identity if any, and a 60s or longer log showing whether packets are one-way or bidirectional. If bidirectional exchange is confirmed, update the relevant RF smoke Beads with evidence; otherwise file the specific RX/TX blocker.
